tolerance_modes.label: Strict
tolerance_modes.hint: Tight tolerance — catches micro-drift before it compounds.

tolerance_modes.label: Standard
tolerance_modes.hint: Default ship gate — matches segment-receipts CLI defaults.

tolerance_modes.label: Relaxed
tolerance_modes.hint: Looser gate — shows how many failures disappear when teams widen tolerance (dangerous).

scenarios.title: Branched Backbone
scenarios.description: Fork-join CNN mimics perception branches. FP16 activation rounding drifts at the stem before either branch recovers.

scenarios.title: Linear Chain
scenarios.description: Deep linear conv stack — the simplest silent regression trap. Drift compounds layer by layer.

scenarios.title: Multi-Output Head
scenarios.description: Two detection heads from one trunk — models the FTL early-publish pattern where downstream only needs one output.

scenarios.title: ResNet Mini
scenarios.description: Blog Fig 5 class problem: export decomposition + FP16 islands on a realistic mini backbone.
